summary: HTTP client for OpenRouter API with chat completion; defines shared request/response types used by both Ollama and OpenRouter clients
side_effects: Makes HTTP requests to OpenRouter API
notes: Implements Client interface defined in summarizer.go. Message types (openRouterRequest, openRouterMessage, openRouterResponse) are shared with ollama.go which reuses them via struct mapping. Includes Authorization header with Bearer token (unlike Ollama which needs no auth).
